title: Test File v2
description: JSON Schema for Tractus-X TestLab test files (kind: test) using YAML Syntax v2. Validates structural shape per ADR-0010. Licensed under Apache-2.0: https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

kind.description: File kind discriminator. Must be 'test' for test files.

id.description: Unique test identifier within its namespace. Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens/underscores.

namespace.description: Parent TCK namespace this test belongs to (e.g., 'ccm-v0.0.1').

setup.description: Steps executed before the main test steps. Used for per-test setup and variable generation.

steps.description: Main test execution steps. At least one step is required.

teardown.description: Steps executed after the main test steps. Used for cleanup regardless of test outcome.

description.description: Detailed description of what this test validates.

tags.description: Categorization tags for filtering and grouping.

id.description: Unique step identifier within this test. Referenced via ${{ steps.id.field }} or ${{ setup.id.field }}.

name.description: Human-readable step label displayed in the IDE.

with.description: Step input parameters. Values may use ${{ }} expressions for variable references.

returns.description: Named output declarations. Each key becomes a referenceable variable.

type.description: Data type of the returned value.

class.description: Semantic class for IDE variable filtering (e.g., 'uuid', 'asset_id', 'offer_id').

with.description: Assertion input parameters (e.g., input, operator, value).
